name: snoqualmietribe.us
message: [AI generated] The Snoqualmie Tribe is an indigenous group in the Pacific Northwest of the US that is federally recognized since 1999. Located in Snoqualmie, Washington, the tribe operates a number of businesses such as the Snoqualmie Casino and invests in initiatives focused on environmental protection, education, and cultural preservation among other key areas. It aims to improve the wellbeing of its tribal members and the local community.
